title: E2E speculative vs AR after #107 graph-replay fix: 35B-A3B MTP 0.67x, 35B DFlash 0.30x, 27B-dense DFlash 1.16x

rows.note: C_B 3.57, cycle wall 32.2 ms (verify 22.2 + prop 4 + drafting ~6). p_min and proposer sync trims measured neutral-to-negative.
Drafter-bound (8-layer BF16 drafter ~50 ms/cycle); graph fix helps verify only. avg_accept 1.47.
Matches retained 1.1615x (graph-auto neutral on the gated lane: gated cycles are mostly root-verify). 27B has no MTP head; MTP n/a.

interpretation: Speculative beats AR only where AR is expensive (27B dense, 1.16x). On 35B-A3B (3B-active AR ~111 tok/s), MTP after #107 is 0.67x (was 0.49x); break-even needs cycle 32.2->21.5 ms: proposer drafting (~6 ms, lm-head argmax bound) + verify busy. 35B DFlash drafter-bound at 0.30x.
